five_values_checked: work-not-tech: leads with hours and rupees lost, not tools; the line 'the goal isn't automation, it's getting your time back' is explicit
quiet-over-loud: plain sentences, no hype, no banned words, 3 hashtags max
respect-owners: names the owner's pain in their words, treats them as smart and busy, soft non-pushy CTA
ship-don't-slide: grounded in a finished, published 5:31 explainer video that is the artefact being posted
map-before-build: foundations framing is the diagnosis-before-build step; CTA is to 'map where your firm stands' first
notes: All copy routed through tools/model_router.py. Intended Gemini primary (long-form/short-post) was unavailable locally (google.generativeai SDK not installed), so the chain failed over to GPT-4o / GPT-4o-mini via OPENAI as designed. Raw model output was voice-edited by hand: original LinkedIn hook ('a thief with a clean getaway') was too clever and buried the number, so it was rewritten to open on the concrete scene + the rupee math, per Setu plainspoken/outcome-first voice. CTA to free Gem ('the first conversation', link in bio) preserved on both platforms. No X, no Instagram, no carousel. Drafts only — not published.
